LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC. RE-NOTICED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO MAY 28, 2013 TO GIVE SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC. THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND TO BE HEARD WITH MS. BARONE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC. MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 21, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Re-Notice Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on Defendant's Motion for Leave to File Amended Cross-Complaint. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended X-Complaint And Correct Mistake
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS COMPLAINANT CLAUDIO BARONE's Motion For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint And Correct Mistake is granted, with 10 days leave to amend. The proposed amendment is not a sham pleading. Plaintiff has not demonstrated prejudice in the amendment of the Cross-Complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Re-Notice Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INC. Re-Noticed Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to May 28, 2013 to give Smelly Mel's Plumbing, Inc. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and to be heard with Ms. Barone's Motion for Leave to File an Amended Cross-Complaint. Smelly Mel's Plumbing, Inc. must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 21, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memo Of P&A

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings - This motion has been re-noticed for hearing on May 21, 2013 per moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
